title: aralia gigantea
intro: Aralia gigantea, also known as the giant polypody or Chinese angelica tree, is a type of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. It is a large, deciduous shrub or small tree native to eastern Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and aiding in digestion, as well as being used to treat respiratory and skin conditions. Aralia gigantea is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or dried extract, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine in the form of a tincture or powder.
